body:
Bugfixes * Fix frequency value printing when using custom format (#1111, CPU / GPU) * Fix display detection for XiaoMi Android phone (Display, Android) Features: * Detect if HDR mode is enabled for screens (Display) * Supported in Windows and Linux (KDE) currently ---
